aboutSection.title: Association of National Economic Cooperation of Uzbekistan
aboutSection.description: The Association carries out activities aimed at developing the economy of Uzbekistan, strengthening international cooperation and attracting investments. We serve as a bridge between the public and private sectors.
aboutSection.missionText: Protecting national economic interests and developing international cooperation
aboutSection.activityText: Attracting investments, strengthening trade relations and supporting economic reforms

contactSection.title: Get in Touch
contactSection.description: Have questions? Want to get more information? Contact us and we will respond shortly.
